meta.title: Gomensensei AKB Fan Tools
meta.description: 非官方 AKB48 fan-made 工具入口：票券風圖片、penlight 顏色、座位參考、資料筆記同小遊戲。

common.fanMade: 非官方 fan-made project，與 AKB48、DH、場地、主辦或票務平台無關。
common.copyright: © 2026 Gomensensei. Fan-made tools for creative and reference use.

home.heroLead: 票券風圖片、penlight 顏色、座位參考、資料筆記同小遊戲，集中一頁即刻用。
home.notice: 本站係非官方 fan-made 網站。Ticket-style 圖片只供應援創作、紀念同設計參考，唔係真票、官方文件或入場證明。
home.toolsLead: 每張卡都係直接入口。舊有工具 URL 會繼續保留，方便已分享出去嘅連結。
home.howLead: 一般 fan 需要知嘅只係三件事：呢啲工具做咩、資料點處理、有問題點搵我。
howItems: 工具只供 fan creation、個人紀錄同參考，唔代表官方資訊。
現時設定主要存在你自己瀏覽器；將來有帳戶功能先會登入儲存。
如果日後有公開統計，只會係你主動 tick 同意後，用不記名方式公開。
home.contactLead: Bug、資料更新、移除要求或合作查詢，直接 DM X: @sorrysir_gomen。

tools.name: 48 Ticket Generator
tools.label: 票券風圖片
tools.desc: 製作 theater ticket-style fan art，適合紀念圖、應援圖同分享用。

tools.name: Penlight List
tools.label: 應援顏色
tools.desc: 查成員 penlight 顏色，演唱會、劇場、生誕企劃前快速確認。

tools.name: AKB Seatmap
tools.label: 座位參考
tools.desc: 非官方座位同企位參考，方便記錄位置同理解場地視角。

tools.name: AKB MBTI with Wota
tools.label: 資料筆記
tools.desc: 整理成員 MBTI、觀察資料同 fan 討論用參考。

tools.name: AKB Mini Games 2026
tools.label: 小遊戲
tools.desc: AKB48 主題嘅實驗性小遊戲同 fan interaction。

privacy.title: 關於及私隱
body: Gomensensei AKB Fan Tools 係非官方 fan-made 網站，主要用作 fan 創作、資料整理、個人紀錄同活動前後參考。
本站同 AKB48、DH、唱片公司、場地、主辦或票務平台無關。Ticket-style 圖片、seatmap、penlight 顏色、MBTI 或其他資料都只係 fan reference。
現時大部分工具唔需要帳戶。語言、顯示設定或部分工具狀態可能會存在你自己瀏覽器嘅 localStorage，方便下次繼續使用。
將來如果加入帳戶功能，seatmap、garapon 或其他工具可能會讓你登入後儲存自己資料，例如座位紀錄、抽選紀錄、garapon 紀錄、偏好設定或個人備註。使用前會清楚標示保存內容同用途。
將來如果提供不記名公開資料功能，例如公開統計、座位/抽選/garapon 匯總或社群參考，會採用 opt-in：你要主動 tick 同意先會公開。公開資料會盡量避免包含可直接識別你身份嘅內容。
如果你唔 tick 公開，你嘅個人紀錄應只用於你自己帳戶或你自己瀏覽器內。你亦應該可以取消公開、刪除或更正相關資料。
日後如果加入 Google 廣告或基本流量統計，第三方服務可能使用 cookies 或類似技術。你可以透過瀏覽器設定管理 cookies。
資料更正、刪除、移除要求或其他查詢，請 DM X: @sorrysir_gomen。

meta.title: Gomensensei AKB Fan Tools
meta.description: Unofficial AKB48 fan-made tool launcher for ticket-style images, penlight colors, seat references, data notes, and mini games.

common.fanMade: Unofficial fan-made project. Not affiliated with AKB48, DH, venues, organisers, or ticketing platforms.
common.copyright: © 2026 Gomensensei. Fan-made tools for creative and reference use.

home.heroLead: Ticket-style images, penlight colors, seat references, data notes, and mini games gathered in one quick launcher.
home.notice: This is an unofficial fan-made site. Ticket-style images are for fan artwork, memories, and design reference only; they are not real tickets or official documents.
home.toolsLead: Each card opens a tool directly. Existing URLs stay active for links that have already been shared.
home.howLead: For most fans, only three things matter: what the tools are for, how data is handled, and how to contact me.
howItems: The tools are for fan creation, personal records, and reference only.
Current settings mostly stay in your browser; account saving may be added later.
Future public statistics should only use anonymous data when you actively opt in.
home.contactLead: For bugs, data updates, removal requests, or collaboration, DM X: @sorrysir_gomen.

tools.name: 48 Ticket Generator
tools.label: Ticket art
tools.desc: Create theater ticket-style fan art for memories, support visuals, and sharing.

tools.name: Penlight List
tools.label: Penlight colors
tools.desc: Check member penlight colors before shows, theater visits, or birthday projects.

tools.name: AKB Seatmap
tools.label: Seat reference
tools.desc: Unofficial seat and standing-position reference for recording locations and view context.

tools.name: AKB MBTI with Wota
tools.label: Data notes
tools.desc: Member MBTI, observation notes, and fan discussion reference.

tools.name: AKB Mini Games 2026
tools.label: Mini games
tools.desc: Experimental AKB48-themed mini games and fan interactions.

privacy.title: About & Privacy
body: Gomensensei AKB Fan Tools is an unofficial fan-made site for fan creation, information organisation, personal records, and event reference.
This site is not affiliated with AKB48, DH, venues, organisers, or ticketing platforms. Ticket-style images, seat maps, penlight colors, MBTI notes, and other data are fan references only.
Most current tools do not require an account. Language, display settings, or tool state may be saved locally in your browser through localStorage.

If account features are added later, tools such as seatmap and garapon may let you save your own records, draw logs, garapon logs, preferences, or notes after login. Each feature should explain what is saved before use.

If anonymous public-data features are added, such as public statistics or aggregated community references, they should be opt-in. You should need to actively tick consent before any data is made public.
If you do not opt in, your personal records should remain for your own account or browser only. You should also be able to unpublish, delete, or correct relevant data.
Future Google ads or analytics may use cookies or similar technologies. You can manage cookies through browser settings.
For corrections, deletion, removal requests, or enquiries, DM X: @sorrysir_gomen.

privacy.title: About & Privacy
body: This is an unofficial fan-made site for fan creation and reference.
It is not affiliated with AKB48, DH, venues, organisers, or ticketing platforms.
Most current tools do not require an account. Some settings may be saved locally in your browser.
Future account features may let users save seatmap, garapon, preference, or note data after login.
Future anonymous public statistics should be opt-in. Users should actively consent before data is made public.
If users do not opt in, personal records should remain private to their own browser or account.
Future Google ads or analytics may use cookies or similar technologies.
For requests, DM X: @sorrysir_gomen.
